description: Vulnerability in the JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Requirements Planning product of Oracle JD Edwards (component: Requirements Planning).   The supported version that is affected is 9.2. Difficult to exploit vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via JDENET to compromise JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Requirements Planning.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Requirements Planning. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.5 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H).
